case_title: AARON DENCE VS. LOWE'S HOME CENTERS, LLC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-08-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS, LLC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS, LLC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-02-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DENCE, AARON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS, LLC. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-02-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-02-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BRUCE LUBARSKY. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AARON DENCE AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE LANCE LAROCQUE, STORE MANAGER FOR LOWE'S HOME CENTERS, LLC. DENNIS REILLY, AN EXPERT WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. PARTIES SIGNED STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE LUBARSKY. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DENCE, AARON AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-02-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DENCE, AARON AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS, LLC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY DENCE, AARON LOWE'S HOME CENTERS, LLC.
